zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线弱势震荡偏空
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD维持低位窄幅整理，价格运行在1995附近，日内波动有限，但整体仍受20日均线压制。SMA20位于2032上方，显示中短期趋势依旧偏弱，市场情绪谨慎，反弹力度暂时不足。

从技术指标观察，MACD处于零轴下方且维持负值，说明空头动能仍占优势，不过跌幅开始放缓，意味着短线存在技术性修复需求。RSI数据缺失，但结合价格结构来看，市场暂未进入明显超买区域。

关键支撑位关注1983一线，该区域是日内低点附近，若失守可能进一步下探1960区域。上方首要阻力位在2000整数关口，其后为2030附近的20日均线压力，突破后才有望打开反弹空间。

交易策略方面，短线建议保持区间思路，激进投资者可依托1985附近轻仓低吸，目标看向2000至2030区域。若价格反弹受阻且MACD继续走弱，则应警惕空头重新发力，注意严格设置止损控制风险。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum continues to trade under moderate bearish pressure, with ETH/USD hovering near 1995 after failing to reclaim the 2000 psychological threshold decisively. The price remains below the 20-day simple moving average at 2032.52, indicating that short-term momentum still favors sellers despite the modest 0.46% daily gain. The narrow intraday range between 1983.66 and 1997.90 also reflects a market lacking strong conviction, suggesting consolidation before a larger directional move develops.

Momentum indicators lean cautiously negative. The MACD reading at -23.745 shows bearish momentum remains active, even though downside acceleration appears to be slowing. RSI data is unavailable, but current price behavior implies neutral-to-weak sentiment rather than oversold conditions. The inability to push above nearby resistance while maintaining support around the lower intraday range suggests traders are hesitant to initiate aggressive long positions without confirmation of renewed buying strength.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is positioned near 1980, followed by a stronger defensive zone around 1950 where buyers may attempt to stabilize price action. On the upside, resistance is forming near 2000 and extends toward the SMA(20) region around 2030–2035. A sustained break above that moving average would improve bullish sentiment and potentially open the path toward 2060. Conversely, rejection below 2000 could expose Ethereum to another wave of selling pressure in the near term.

Short-term traders may prefer a cautious range-trading approach until a clearer breakout occurs. Bullish entries become more attractive only if ETH closes firmly above 2030 with improving momentum confirmation. Conservative traders may wait for MACD stabilization before increasing exposure. Meanwhile, bearish setups remain viable on failed rallies beneath resistance, particularly if volume weakens near 2000. Risk management remains essential given the current low-volatility but directionally fragile market structure.
